## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] manual smoke test (if behavior changed)
- [ ] migration impact checked (if schema/data changed)

## Risk Checklist

- [ ] no secrets added to code, logs, or docs
- [ ] mail flow behavior reviewed (rate limits, suppression, unsubscribe, retries) when relevant
- [ ] rollback path considered

## AI Assistance Disclosure

- [ ] no material AI assistance
- [ ] material AI assistance used and validated by human review/testing
